name: Kidscom by CommonGround
subtitle: Stay connected with your family

description.short: A safe, fun app for kids to video call family members. Part of the CommonGround co-parenting platform.
description.full:
Kidscom is a child-friendly app that lets kids stay connected with both parents and approved family members through safe video calls, messages, and shared activities.

🎨 DESIGNED FOR KIDS
• Large, colorful buttons that are easy to tap
• Fun emojis and friendly interface
• Simple PIN login (no passwords to remember)
• Age-appropriate design approved by child psychologists

📞 VIDEO CALLS
• Call Mom, Dad, grandparents, and family
• High-quality video that works on any connection
• One-tap calling with no complicated settings
• Say goodbye with the friendly wave button

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 MY CIRCLE
• See all approved family members
• Know who's online and available
• Parents control who's in the circle
• Safe, parent-approved connections only

🎬 THEATER MODE
• Watch videos together with family
• Shared viewing during video calls
• Parent-approved content only
• Quality time even when apart

🎮 FUN GAMES
• Play games during calls
• Tic-tac-toe, drawing, and more
• Multiplayer fun with family
• New games added regularly

🔒 PARENT CONTROLLED
• Parents manage all settings from CommonGround app
• No in-app purchases or ads
• No social features or strangers
• COPPA compliant for child safety

⚠️ IMPORTANT: This app requires a CommonGround parent account to set up. Children cannot create accounts themselves - parents must invite them through the CommonGround parent app.

Kidscom is part of the CommonGround co-parenting platform, trusted by thousands of families to keep kids connected with the people who love them.

targetAudience.note: Designed for children under parent supervision

required: Colorful home screen with activity options
Video call with large friendly controls

whats_new:
• New colorful design kids will love
• Improved video calling experience
• Fun new games in the Arcade
• Better connection for smoother calls
